text:
(In reply to Rodrigo Osorio from comment #1)
Of course. I use

"FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE-p9 #0: Tue Apr  3 16:59:16 UTC 2018"

with latest updates. Ports tree updating every day and upgrading ports also everyday by "portupgrade -arR". This error appear after "portupgrade -arR" command. The "c-icap" port version installed is 0.4.4,2.

Can i give you another information?
